Pro Tips

  • Use keyboard shortcuts for faster navigation
  • Track your performance metrics to improve efficiency
  • Set up break alerts to maintain work-life balance
  • Use Spanish templates for bilingual customer support
  • Enable auto-save to prevent data loss
